## Wire type

A Wire is a function that receives an observable, the store and the on function of the bus it will run in and returns a subscription.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type Wire<PayloadType> = (observable: Observable<WirePayload<PayloadType>>, store: Store<RootXStoreState>, on: XBus['on']) => Subscription;
```
<b>References:</b> [WirePayload](./x-components.wirepayload.md)<!-- -->, [RootXStoreState](./x-components.rootxstorestate.md)<!-- -->, [XBus](./x-components.xbus.md)
